name: property managers handling 10-20 leases/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 leases/month, missed lease renewal deadlines cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated lease management alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10-20 leases/month, missed lease renewal deadlines cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated lease management alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
